templates.name: Content Creator/Influencer Inquiry
templates.content:
We love working with our community, and keep an eye on our @freshcleanthreads tags on social media! Be sure to tag us in your photos wearing your threads, and we'll get in touch if there are opportunities to work together.
We're also occasionally on the lookout for partners using Insense or Popular Pays-if you see a listing for us there, please apply, and we'll be in touch if it's a good fit.

templates.name: How can I edit my shipping address?
templates.content:
Please email us at support@freshcleantees.com as soon as possible if you would like to make changes to your shipping address. Our fulfillment center processes orders quickly, but we'll do our best to process your request.

If we are unable to make the change in time, we will be happy to re-ship your order for a $7.95 reshipping fee.

templates.name: Order History Inquiry
templates.content: If you placed orders using your email address before you set up your Fresh Clean Threads account, those previous orders will not be reflected in your new account. If you're looking for details about your previous orders, check your email inbox for your confirmation emails. Or, feel free to send us a message at support@freshcleantees.com, and we'll look into it for you.

templates.name: Order Tracking
templates.content: If you have an account, you can find order status details on the Order History tab of your Account Page by logging in here: https://freshcleantees.com/account/login

templates.name: Can't find order marked delivered
templates.content:
Occasionally a carrier will mark a package as delivered early, so we recommend keeping an eye out for your order for the next 48 hours. We also always suggest checking all surrounding areas and/or entrances to your home to check that your package is not hiding or jammed, and asking your neighbors if they may have received it for you by mistake.
If you still can't find it, send us an email at support@freshcleantees.com. We'll get you sorted out ASAP.

templates.name: Subscription Delivery Updates
templates.content:
To make changes to your delivery schedule, follow the steps below.

1. Log into your Fresh Clean Threads account
2. Click Upcoming Orders
3. Select the subscription pack you'd like to edit
4. Click Edit Schedule
5. Click Skip next charge to skip a shipment, or
6. Choose your updated frequency and/or charge date
7. Click Save changes

templates.name: Where’s my Amazon order?
templates.content: When you place an order for our threads via Amazon, the details are only available directly in your Amazon account. If you need help locating the order, please contact Amazon directly: https://www.amazon.com/hz/contact-us/foresight/hubgateway

templates.name: Cancel/pause/Return Membership
templates.content:
We are sad to see you go! You can cancel your Club FCT membership by visiting the Membership tab of your Account page. From there, click Turn Off Auto-renew. There are no termination fees or hidden costs to cancel. Your membership benefits will remain active until 12 months from your last renewal date.

All purchases of Club FCT membership are final and cannot be returned, refunded or paused.

templates.name: Locate Order Number
templates.content:
You can find your order number in the subject line of your order confirmation email, shipping confirmation email, or delivered confirmation email.

Or, if you have an account set up on freshcleanthreads.com, you can find it on the Order History tab of your Account Page.

templates.name: Troubleshooting membership issues
templates.content:
Your Club FCT benefits are linked to the email address you used to purchase membership, so you need to use that same email to access your benefits. Your discounts and free shipping benefits will be visible on the shipping page of check out.

That said, it's possible that we were unable to renew your membership due to your payment method requiring an update. If that is the case, your membership has been canceled, but you can easily rejoin Club FCT by adding the membership to your cart when placing your next order with us and using your updated payment method.

Also, due to a tech limitation with our returns portal, your Club FCT discount won't automatically apply if you're using the Shop Now feature to exchange your threads for an alternative item. Our customer experience team is here to help make sure you still get your savings in the form of a retroactive refund-just send us a note at support@freshcleantees.com and we will get it taken care of.

If you're having trouble beyond the above, please reach out to our customer support team (support@freshcleantees.com) and we can help.

templates.name: Update Membership Payment Method
templates.content:
Happy to help you with this! To update the payment for your Club Fresh Clean Threads membership, follow the steps below:

1. Log into your Fresh Clean Threads account
2. Click Membership
3. Under Payment Method, click Edit
4. Check your email inbox-we will send an email with a link to update your payment method

templates.name: Wrong Item/Missing Item in Order
templates.content: We are so sorry to hear that happened! Please email us at support@freshcleantees.com. We'll get you the right threads as quickly as we can!

templates.name: Membership Recurring Fee
templates.content: Yes, your Club Fresh Clean Threads benefits are automatically renewed (using your original payment method) 12 months from the date of purchase or previous renewal date.

templates.name: Do I need a freshcleanthreads.com account to join Club Fresh Clean Threads?
templates.content: It's not required, but we recommend it! That way, you can see the details of your upcoming auto-renewal and make changes to your membership.

templates.name: Payment with gift card
templates.content:
To redeem your gift card, just choose Gift Card as your payment method at checkout, and enter the unique code included in your gift card email. If the gift card amount is less than your order total, you'll also need to add an additional payment method to cover the remaining balance for the order. If your gift card has a remaining balance after your order is placed, you can use that amount on your next order, so be sure to save your unique code to use again next time.

If you are returning an item purchased with a gift card, the funds will be returned to the gift card if still valid. If the gift card is not still valid, the refund will be processed as a new gift card for a future purchase.

templates.name: Why did you increase the price for your subscriptions?
templates.content:
First and foremost, we totally understand your concern over the price increase. This was not an easy decision for us and we want to be transparent about why.
 
We always strive to deliver incredible value to our customers by keeping our tees as affordable as possible. However, over the last couple years, we have seen significant price increases in our raw materials (such as the cotton that makes your tees so soft) and logistics (the packages that transport those comfy tees to your doorsteps). We will never sacrifice the quality and safety standards of our fabric and manufacturers, which is why we decided to increase prices for our short sleeve subscription packs.

templates.name: Where can I leave a review?
templates.content: Reviews can be left on our website via any product page. Was there a certain product you wanted to leave a review for?

templates.name: Do you sell Tall Crew Necks and Tall V-Necks?
templates.content: We're glad you asked! We sell both Tall Crew Necks and Tall V-Necks. Like our standard tees, they're made with our very own, extremely comfy cotton/poly fabric blend of StratuSoft. Each tall tee is designed with two extra inches in torso length and an extra inch in sleeve length. You can browse them here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/tall-tees

templates.name: Where are you located?
templates.content: Our offices are located in the very lovely neighborhood of La Jolla, San Diego but we're online-only, so our threads ship from our out-of-state warehouse.

templates.name: What materials/fabric do you use?
templates.content: We use a few different fabric blends. Our most popular is StratuSoft, our very own fabric blend. It's 60% cotton and 40% polyester, making for a smooth, lightweight feel. You can spot what material goes into each style on its respective product page, but let me know if there's a specific style you're curious about, and I can share more!

templates.name: How do I remove the stain on my Tee?
templates.content: Personally, I find that dish soap, white vinegar, and baking soda can get most stains out if you let them sit for a bit and then give it a careful scrub before washing.

templates.name: Why did you increase your shipping charges?
templates.content:
Thanks so much for getting in touch about this. I'm happy to share some context about our recent shipping fee changes.
 
We work hard to thoughtfully choose partners who will ensure safe delivery of our threads to our customers. Unfortunately, we have seen some of these partners increase their prices. In an effort to ensure we still meet our customers expectations for the efficient and safe delivery of their orders, we have made the difficult decision to update our shipping fees.

templates.name: Do you offer printing services?
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out! We are delighted by your interest in our threads. We don't currently offer screen printing services, but we do sell our tees wholesale! You can check out our wholesale site here: https://wholesale.freshcleantees.com/

templates.name: Customer shares feedback about new products/color
templates.content: Thanks for getting in touch! We don't currently offer that product but I agree that it'd be really cool to have! I will definitely be passing this idea on to our team. We truly love it when our customers swing by and share ideas for new products. We're always working on new things, so keep an eye out on our social media to find out whenever we release new products.

templates.name: Do you offer international shipping?
templates.content: We are always thrilled to find out Fresh Clean Threads is wanted around the world! At this time, we only ship to the United States, Canada and UK. However, we hope to expand and ship to more countries down the road. As our company grows, the best way to keep up with what we're doing (and where) is to follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/freshcleanthreads

templates.name: How do I gift a subscription?
templates.content:
There are a few different options to gift someone a subscription of their own:
 
 1. You can place an order and start a subscription for your friend. They would then have to update the payment information with their card after the first month (or your card will continue to be charged). Please know you can cancel the subscription after the first month if you don't want to wait for them to update the payment method.
 
 2. You can send them a gift card and they can order the threads of their choosing.
 
 3. You can send them a one-time order, and if they like it, they can start their own subscription!

templates.name: How should I measure myself?
templates.content:
Our size chart measures directly across the tee (not all the way around like a dress shirt would). We have a size chart on our site that works as a guide on how to measure as well as a separate chart for each style. You can check out our size chart here: https://freshcleantees.com/size-chart
 
We also have a Fit Finder tool on our site, which allows you to enter a few measurements and be provided with a recommended size, just for you. Just click "Find My Fit" when shopping. Let me know if you have any other questions!

templates.name: Build your own pack
templates.content: You can build your own 5-pack with our Bundle Builder, choosing from our many styles, from tees to outerwear to bottoms. Best of all, you save $10 when you do. Check out our Bundle Builder: https://freshcleantees.com/bundle-builder/crew-necks

templates.name: Do you have a store on Amazon?
templates.content: We've recently started selling some of our threads on Amazon to bring Fresh Clean Threads to more customers! We always recommend shopping through our main site for the best Fresh Clean Threads experience, but we paid attention to how many of our valued customers were asking if we were on Amazon. It's only a small selection of our product line on there, so shopping our site is still the best way to get all the goods!

templates.name: Do you have 3XL Tees?
templates.content: We're so happy you asked! We have a whole collection of 3XL threads that we're always adding to with new releases. Check out our 3XL Collection here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/3xl

templates.name: Already purchased - brand specific
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out! We're so excited to hear that you placed an order with us! Enjoy your new threads, and let us know if you have any questions.

templates.name: Are your Tees sweat proof?
templates.content: Our standard tees are not made to be moisture-wicking or sweat-proof. That said, many of our customers love to wear our tees to the gym, exercise classes, or outdoor athletic activities!

templates.name: Do you have crew necks?
templates.content: You can check out our Crew Necks here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/crew-necks

templates.name: Will you have more Women's Tee options soon?
templates.content:
This is a question that has been brought up to our product development team and they are currently looking at it, but don't know yet specifically when new options for women will arrive.

However, I'm happy to let you know that all of the apparel available on our website s unisex, so definitely feel free to check all of our available products! We're always working to keep a diversity of products so everyone always has options to choose from, whether it is from different sizes, collections, or different colors within the collections.

templates.name: How can I model for your company?
templates.content: We're not currently looking for models, but we love working with our community and keep an eye on our @freshcleanthreads tags! Be sure to tag us in your photos wearing your threads!

templates.name: What are your Tees made of?
templates.content: Our tees are made with StratuSoft, our very own 60/40 cotton-poly fabric blend. (The only exceptions are our Eco Fresh Tees and our Slim Fit line.) StratuSoft makes our tees feel super fresh, incredibly soft, and extremely durable. All of our threads are made from high-quality, comfy material, from our outerwear to our bottoms.

templates.name: How do your Hoodies fit?
templates.content:
Our Hoodies have a similar fit to our signature tees, but we hear from many of our customers that sizing up makes for a better fit, they tend to like the more relaxed fit. I personally like to size up my Hoodies, too, because it makes it easy and comfortable to layer my tees underneath!
 
Our 100-day guarantee makes it easy to test the sizing out too, if it's not a good fit after giving it a try, you can always head over to our returns portal: https://returns.freshcleantees.com/ to make a return or exchange.

templates.name: Where can I find your V-Necks?
templates.content: You can check out our V-Necks here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/v-necks

templates.name: I can't activate my account
templates.content:
Sorry to hear that you are having trouble activating your account! We have spoken to our technical team about this and they recommend clearing your cache and cookies. You can find the steps here: https://www.computerhope.com/issues/ch001378.htm 
 
If you're still having trouble after that, can you please let us know what device and browser you're using? Any screenshots of error messages are helpful, too!

templates.name: How much do your Tees weigh?
templates.content: Our standard tees are a lightweight material and vary slightly in weight based on size. For example, a size large crew neck weighs about 5.3 ounces.

templates.name: Neckline sizes/measurements
templates.content:
Thanks for reaching out! While the fit of our crew necks' neckline will feel different with each customer's neck size, I'm happy to share the neckline sizes for your easy reference. The below sizes are measured seam to seam, and we recommend comparing them with your best-fitting tee for a good idea of what you prefer.
 
 S: 6 1/2"
 M: 6 3/4"
 L: 7"
 XL: 7 1/2"
 2X: 7 3/4"
 3X: 8"
 
 Keep in mind, each measurement has a 1/4" tolerance.

templates.name: Difference between regular and Slim Fit Henley
templates.content: Our slim fit henleys are made with a tri-blend (50% polyester, 25% cotton, 25% rayon) to ensure the material always stays tight to your body after several washes. In comparison, our regular henleys on the other hand are made with a regular cut and with our Stratusoft blend which is a 60/40 cotton/poly.

templates.name: Can I customize my subscription? (only for customers who already have subscriptions)
templates.content: We don't currently have the ability to customize renewal packs. In the meantime, if there are certain colors that you are interested in, we can skip your monthly renewal and send you a custom invoice, instead! If you would like to do that just let me know which colors and sizes you would like and I can help.

templates.name: Do you offer tall sizes for your Hoodies?
templates.content:
While we don't currently offer our Hoodies in Tall sizes, many of our tall customers tell us that choosing one size up works great to get a little extra length in our Hoodies. I'd suggest giving that a try! Our 100-day guarantee makes it easy to test the sizing out too, if it's not a good fit, you can always head over to our returns portal: https://returns.freshcleantees.com/ to make a return or exchange.
 
 In the meantime, I'll also let our Product Development team know that you'd like to see Tall sizes for our Hoodies.

templates.name: California/Destination charges (Taxes)
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out! We are happy to clarify why you are seeing these taxes. California charges for outgoing packages from a local business and the other charges you see are the destination charges from your district. Taxes are automatically added from a large third-party business, and they are accurate to the state and county.

templates.name: What types of fit do your Tees come in?
templates.content: Our tees are primarily a regular cut, designed to fit everybody, but we do offer Tall Tees and Slim Fit Tees for customers looking for those two fit-specific styles.

templates.name: How does the return process work?
templates.content:
I can definitely help clarify the return process after using our returns portal! Just follow the steps below:
 
 1. Securely pack the items. 
 2. Attach your return label to the package.
 3. Drop off the package within 14 days at your nearest USPS location.
 
Once there is tracking on the package showing it is on its way back to us, your refund or exchange will be processed. From there, it will post back to your original payment method in 5-10 business days.

templates.name: Order arrived damanged
templates.content: Sorry that happened! Please send us a note at support@freshcleantees.com. From there we'll find a solution right away.

templates.name: Why aren't my tracking details updating?
templates.content: Sometimes, the carrier takes 1-2 business days to register your shipment status, so we recommend allowing 48 hours for the tracking details to update. If your tracking number isn't updating or working after that, please reach out to us via support@freshcleantees.com. We're always here to help!

templates.name: Log in issues to FreshCleanThreads.com
templates.content:
If you have already set up an account with your email address but are unable to log in, you may still need to activate the account. Check your email inbox (and your spam/junk folder just in case!) for an email from Fresh Clean Threads. Just click the link in the invitation to finish the setup process.

If you can't find the activation email, send us a note at support@freshcleantees.com, and we can resend it

templates.name: Women's Tee size changes
templates.content:
Thanks for getting in touch! We did recently update the fit of our Women's tees slightly, based on feedback from our customers. Here are the measurement changes:

XS - Bust about 1/2" smaller
S - Bust about 1/2" larger
M - Bust about 1 1/2" larger, length about 1 1/2" longer
L - Bust about 2 1/2" larger, length about 1/2" longer
XL - Bust about 3 1/2" larger, length about 1" longer
2X - Bust about 4" larger, length about 1" longer
3X - Bust about 4" larger, length about 1" longer
 
That being said, both the first-generation and updated fit tees are made with our signature Stratusoft fabric, so they'll have the same super soft feel.

templates.name: Positive feedback
templates.content: Thank you so much for the kind words! We love hearing from our community and appreciate you taking the time. Please always feel free to reach out if you need anything.

templates.name: Tax Exempt Request
templates.content: Please send us a photo of your tax-exempt documentation at support@freshcleantees.com. Our team is more than happy to help out!

templates.name: What sizes do you offer?
templates.content: Currently, most of our products are offered in sizes S-3XL, with some styles offering 4XL.

templates.name: What is Club FCT?
templates.content: Club Fresh Clean Threads is our exclusive membership program. For only $19 per year, you'll get 20% off, free shipping on all orders plus other Club Fresh Clean Threads perks! Check it out here: https://freshcleantees.com/membership

templates.name: What is the difference between Club FCT and purchasing a subscription?
templates.content: Club Fresh Clean Threads (FCT) is our exclusive membership program where you get 20% off, free shipping on all others plus other Club Fresh Clean perks: https://freshcleantees.com/membership With our Subscribe and Save program you can choose the 3-pack(s) you want and set how often you'd like them to arrive. As a subscriber, you get free shipping and early access to new or limited-edition colors through recurring subscription packs: https://freshcleantees.com/subscriptions

templates.name: Where can I find shirts in 3xl?
templates.content: Check out the 3XL collection here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/3xl

templates.name: Can I change my delivery schedule, or skip a month?
templates.content: To make any changes to your subscription just login to your account and click Overview, then on the pack you want to change click Edit. On the next screen you can change the renewal date, swap the pack to something new, change the size or neck preference, or cancel entirely.

templates.name: Do the shirts shrink?
templates.content:
Our Stratusoft blend may shrink 1/4" - 1/3" during the first wash or two. In order to minimize shrinkage, wash your threads with cold water and tumble dry low, or air dry.

We always recommend washing just one of your tees first, to see if any shrinkage occurs before washing the rest.

templates.name: How do I cancel a subscription?
templates.content:
You can cancel a subscription anytime. Just follow the steps below.

1. Log into your Fresh Clean Threads account.
2. Click Upcoming Order and select the 3-pack you'd like to cancel.
3. Click Edit Product, followed by Remove Product.
4. Choose the reason for your cancellation and click Cancel Subscription.

You can also contact our amazing customer experience team before your next renewal. Just email support@freshcleantees.com and they'll help complete your cancellation.

templates.name: How are the subscription pack colors selected each month?
templates.content:
Our tee shirt subscription is based on your style selection. We have nine style preferences that help us curate your shipment to deliver colors that fit that style. We also try to vary the colors based on the season.

You'll get an email 3 days prior to your renewal with our monthly color blog. You can make changes to your preference up until your order is processed. Make sure to safe list  support@freshcleantees.com in order to receive our notifications.

templates.name: Do you have a size chart?
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://freshcleantees.com/size-chart

templates.name: How do I change my payment method?
templates.content: To update the credit card for your subscription, just login to your Fresh Clean Threads account and click Account Details. Under Paymant Method, click Edit and enter your new payment method.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://freshcleantees.com/help/returns-exchanges

templates.name: Do You Ship On Amazon?
templates.content: Yes, you can find Fresh Clean Threads on Amazon. We even have a brand store on there: https://www.amazon.com/stores/FreshCleanThreads/page/FD77F9FC-0E73-47B8-9883-1A4A30344819 Keep in mind, it's a more limited selection than what you'd find on our site. For the most complete lineup of our products, including our latest releases, it's best to shop directly on our site.

templates.name: Where do you ship to?
templates.content: We ship to any of the 50 US states and Puerto Rico, as well as APO's & FPO's. For Canada orders visit our Canada website: https://freshcleantees.ca/

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content:
Thank you for your interest! You can visit our wholesale  site here: https://wholesale.freshcleantees.com/

Or if you have further questions, the best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at support@freshcleantees.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/freshcleanthreads/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/FreshCleanThreads/

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Do you deliver to military bases?
templates.content: Yes, we deliver to all APO's and FPO's. Please note that the shipping time can vary with these addresses and may take longer to arrive.

templates.name: What are the benefits for a subscription vs. a one-time purchase?
templates.content: As a subscriber, you get free shipping on your subscription orders, early access to new or limited edition colors, and easy management of your subscription.

templates.name: Can I change out a color on certain packages?
templates.content:
Unfortunately, we can't do customized color swaps with subscription orders, given that these are pre-set packages.

You do have the option to build your own bundle and customize a 5-pack with Fresh Clean Threads: https://freshcleantees.com/bundle-builder/crew-necks It's just outside of subscription offerings.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out! The best way to handle this is to email us directly at support@freshcleantees.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content:
You can start your return here: https://freshcleantees.loopreturns.com/#/ Please follow these steps: 

1. In the portal, enter your order number (you can find it in the subject line of your order confirmation email)
2. Select "Return" or "Exchange" and follow the steps to generate your prepaid label. You can also swap for a different item by selecting "Return" and using "Shop Now Credit" to visit the store for the new item!

Please note, orders placed via Facebook Shop or Instagram Shop can only be returned or exchanged in full.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once your return has been received and processed, your refund will be applied. From there, you'll see the refund posted back to your original payment method in 5-10 business days.

templates.name: Do you have gift cards?
templates.content: Yes, we sell gift cards. You can buy them in the amounts of $25, $50, $75 or $100. Keep in mind, they cannot be used for renewals. Check out our gift cards here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/gift-cards

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Please email us at support@freshcleantees.com as soon as possible if you would like to cancel or make changes to your order. Our fulfillment center processes orders quickly, but we'll do our best to process your request.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our threads are designed by a team of product developers in San Diego, then manufactured in a variety of factories in Guatemala, Vietnam, and the Philippines.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all subscription orders, on all orders over $100, and on Club FCT Member orders.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content:
Our standard shipping takes 4-7 business days after processing. It is $7.95 or free when you spend $100 or more, after promotions. Our expedited shipping takes 2-3 business days after processing, it is $17. 

Please allow 1-2 business days for us to receive and process your order. You'll get a shipment notification email with a tracking number as soon as your package ships.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We are proud to offer 18% off to all current/former military and their spouses/dependents, law enforcement, first responders, and teachers. You can find more details here: https://freshcleantees.com/military-discount including steps for verifying your status and redeeming your discount.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content:
We love working with our community, and keep an eye on our @freshcleanthreads tags on social media! Be sure to tag us in your photos wearing your threads, and we'll get in touch if there are opportunities to work together.
 
We're also occasionally on the lookout for partners using Insense: https://insense.pro/for-creators or Popular Pays: https://popularpays.com/creator If you see a listing for us there, please apply, and we'll be in touch if it's a good fit.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content:
Happy to help! Our tees run true to size, so we recommend choosing the size you wear most. If you need an extra hand, you can use our interactive Find My Fit tool linked on our product pages to get a specific suggestion based on your personal details.

You can also use the size chart on each product page to compare the specifications of another tee in your closet with the measurements of our threads. If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: How does a subscription work?
templates.content:
Our subscriptions are the perfect way to keep your closet as fresh as possible! We offer packs of staple threads, or rotating monthly packs with colors that update each month. You choose the pack and shipment frequency, and we automatically send you fresh threads to keep your closet stocked.

Subscribers also enjoy free shipping on all subscription orders, and early access to new or limited edition colors. To sign up, shop our subscription options here: https://freshcleantees.com/collections/all-subscription-options

templates.name: How should I wash the tees?
templates.content: Good question! Be sure to wash your threads with cold water and air dry to best keep the fit intact. Keep in mind, our tees can be expected to shrink 1/4" to 1/2" after washing.

templates.name: How can I update my subscription items?
templates.content:
To change the items in your subscription, follow the steps below.

1. Log into your Fresh Clean Threads account
2. Click Upcoming Orders
3. Select the subscription pack you'd like to edit
4. Click Add products to add additional items to your shipment
5. Click Swap product to choose a different subscription

templates.name: Fondue Promotion Inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for reaching out! Once you complete your order you will receive an email that will provide next steps about your 25% CashBack. You will be able to redeem as a store credit or a visa gift card.
